case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION vs. MASCOLA, DAVID M. et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MASCOLA, DAVID M. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-17-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-19-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-27-1996

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-16-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-16-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-17-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-16-1996 TO JAN-29-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION SERVED JUL-03-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MASCOLA, DAVID M.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-17-1996, CONTINUED TO NOV-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-18-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-18-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT. HEARING SET FOR DEC-16-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-29-1997, OFF CALENDAR
